changes.reason: New high-value App Store download/update failure cluster supported by current Apple China support pages; existing canonical articles only mention adjacent billing, network, storage, or Screen Time cases.

queries: App Store 无法下载 App
上一个购买项目有账单问题
App Store 找不到 内容与隐私限制
canonicalReview.notes: Matched articles cover storage categories, Apple Pay terminal payment, Wi-Fi connectivity, Screen Time requests, or Ask to Buy. None is the canonical App Store download/update workflow with billing verification, priority download, missing App Store restrictions, and redownload/account routing.
